raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding a charge of {$130.00} for a stay at XXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX, NJ, which occurred on [ insert dates of stay ]. The issue centers around poor service and unresolved complaints with the merchant, XXXX XXXX, and AmEx 's failure to resolve the dispute to my satisfaction. 

During my stay, I encountered the following issues : XXXX. Unpleasant Room Conditions : I was assigned a room that had a strong cigarette odor. I immediately reported this to the front desk and requested to be moved to another room. The front desk staff informed me that they could not accommodate my request at that moment but assured me that someone would contact me. No one ever followed up or took any action. 

2. Unusable Ironing Board and Iron : The ironing board and iron in the room were filthy and unusable, which was particularly problematic as I was on a business trip and needed to iron my clothing. I alerted the front desk staff again, and they told me someone would bring a replacement ironing board and iron, but this never happened.

3. Noisy Room Location : My room was directly above the entrance, in a very noisy area. I mentioned this concern to the front desk, but no effort was made to move me or alleviate the noise.

As a Diamond Status member, I am accustomed to higher standards, including the ability to request room changes without additional fees. However, none of my requests were fulfilled during my stay. The hotel provided services that were far below expectations, and my attempts to resolve the issues directly with the merchant were ignored.

After my stay, I contacted AmEx promptly, providing all relevant details and documentation to dispute the charge. Despite my efforts, AmEx has failed to resolve the issue favorably, and I am now seeking a resolution from AmEx regarding this charge.

I have made extensive attempts to address the issue with XXXX XXXX, and I have provided AmEx with all the necessary information to resolve this dispute. However, AmEx has not taken action to resolve the charge of {$130.00}, and I am seeking a fair resolution. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
